content:
I want you to recover  and this situation never happens again we need to have our own data center how is tha possible if delete by Supabase we never lose we can recover end to end The fastest path to actual recovery is to check your Supabase dashboard for Point-in-Time Recovery or automated backups. If a backup exists from before July 6, 2026 10:47 UTC, the 1,167 visitors, 27,646 events, and 879 CRM investors can be restored.

Do you want me to:

Build a recovery/backup automation so this never happens again, or
First help you verify whether Supabase PITR is enabled for your project?
